sections.paragraph:
Original: מרזח

Transliteration: mirzach

Phonetic: meer-zakh'

BDB Definition:

  1. cry, cry of joy, revelry
    1. mourning cry
      1. perhaps, feast cry
    2. cry of revelry

Origin: from an unused root meaning to scream

TWOT entry: 2140a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
